name: WLF_VILT_ACTION_STATUS
description: Table to store status and errors of virtual ILT actions such as create meeting, update meeting, etc

columns.Name: VILT_ACTION_STATUS_ID
columns.Comments: Vilt action status PK

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: Learning Item Id in which the VILT action was performed on

columns.Name: SOURCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Source type of the source id column

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: Source id

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of vilt action (create, update, delete etc.)

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the vilt action, error, success, etc.

columns.Name: LOG
columns.Comments: Log for the vilt action

columns.Name: ACTION_TIMESTAMP
columns.Comments: Timestamp of the vilt action

columns.Name: ERROR_CODE
columns.Comments: Error code of vilt action

columns.Name: INSTR_VILT_REL_ID
columns.Comments: The instructor account used for VILT api call

columns.Name: RESOLUTION_STATUS
columns.Comments: Column to indicate what action the user has taken for this log entry

columns.Name: MAX_RETRIES
columns.Comments: Max number of retries

columns.Name: NOTES
columns.Comments: Notes

columns.Name: ERROR_LOG
columns.Comments: Contains error information about the failed call to VILT provider

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
